items.title_en: Analysis: the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index, which tracks 30 largest US-listed chipmakers, is up ~75% YTD and on track for its biggest annual gain since 1999 (Financial Times)
items.title_zh: 分析：追踪美国 30 家最大上市芯片制造商的费城半导体指数今年迄今已上涨约 75%，有望创下 1999 年以来的最大年度涨幅（《金融时报》）
items.title_bilingual: 分析：追踪美国 30 家最大上市芯片制造商的费城半导体指数今年迄今已上涨约 75%，有望创下 1999 年以来的最大年度涨幅（《金融时报》） / Analysis: the Philadelphia Semiconductor Index, which tracks 30 largest US-listed chipmakers, is up ~75% YTD and on track for its biggest annual gain since 1999 (Financial Times)

items.title: Global AI hardware demand is easing China's concerns over a stronger yuan hurting exports, as AI hardware exports surge and chip equipment imports rise (Bloomberg)
items.title_original: Global AI hardware demand is easing China's concerns over a stronger yuan hurting exports, as AI hardware exports surge and chip equipment imports rise (Bloomberg)
items.title_en: Global AI hardware demand is easing China's concerns over a stronger yuan hurting exports, as AI hardware exports surge and chip equipment imports rise (Bloomberg)
items.title_zh: 随着人工智能硬件出口激增和芯片设备进口增加，全球人工智能硬件需求正在缓解中国对人民币升值损害出口的担忧（彭博社）
items.title_bilingual: 随着人工智能硬件出口激增和芯片设备进口增加，全球人工智能硬件需求正在缓解中国对人民币升值损害出口的担忧（彭博社） / Global AI hardware demand is easing China's concerns over a stronger yuan hurting exports, as AI hardware exports surge and chip equipment imports rise (Bloomberg)

items.title: Kuaishou reports Q1 revenue up 3.4% YoY to ~$5B and Kling AI revenue up 300%+ YoY to ~$96M; Kling reached a ~$500M annualized revenue run rate in March 2026 (Coco Feng/South China Morning Post)
items.title_original: Kuaishou reports Q1 revenue up 3.4% YoY to ~$5B and Kling AI revenue up 300%+ YoY to ~$96M; Kling reached a ~$500M annualized revenue run rate in March 2026 (Coco Feng/South China Morning Post)

items.title_zh: 快手报告第一季度收入同比增长 3.4% 至约 5B 美元，Kling AI 收入同比增长 300% 以上至约 9600 万美元； Kling 于 2026 年 3 月达到约 5 亿美元的年化收入运行率（Coco Feng/南华早报）
